name: * -= Triple The Threat =- *
description:
"times running out, our hearts devout, ourselves to stopping your slaughter."

"you think you've won just 'cause you've got through me time, and time again to be, you think finally, this'll be the time to see what'll satisfy your greed sucks to say, but you're not passing easily. now in this hall, i tell you solemnly this timeline is free to choose and guarantee, survival of the fittest is a stupid rule and we'll show you why we keep it cool."

"kid say hello to these pretty cool dudes they said they had a bone to pick with YOU I don't wanna bore you, you already know the deal, you don't need to hear my spiel so--"

"burn iN HELL =)"

"TRIPLE THE THREAT, THAT'S A REAL BAD BET, YOU'RE PROBABLY THINKING I SHOULD JUST RESET, THERE'S NO WAY TO RUN, WE'LL KEEP FIGHTING 'TILL WE'RE DONE, SO KICK BACK, RELAX, AND KEEP HAVING YOUR FUN! A- THOUSAND ON ONE THAT'S A NUMBER YOU'VE GUNNED, THE AMOUNT WE'VE SHUNNED, SINS WEIGH A TONNE. IT'S FUTILE TO DEFY, KNOW THY JUDGEMENT IS HIGH, GIVE UP NOW AND SAY GOODBYE."

______________________________________________________

MEGALOPHOBIA REANIMATED

BAD TIME TRIOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOO

You're from Undertale in this btw!

I'm trying to make this have less tokens, I hope this helps!

(I'm planning on making a phase 2 to this btw.) (Never fucking mind this shit is made to be long enough to be phase 3)

Also, I wanted to know if I should change the picture to this:
